2111.iwh_en: It was narrated that Muwarriq al-'Ijli said: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Learn the obligatory shares of inheritance, the rules of Arabic grammar, and the Sunnah, just as you learn the Quran."'
2111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Muwarriq al-'Ijli berkata: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Pelajarilah ilmu faraidh, kaidah bahasa Arab, dan Sunnah, sebagaimana kalian mempelajari Al-Qur'an."'

2112.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibrahim said: 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Learn the obligatory shares of inheritance, for they are part of your religion."'
2112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibrahim berkata: 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Pelajarilah faraidh, karena ia merupakan bagian dari agama kalian."'

2113.iwh_en: It was narrated that Yusuf al-Majishun said: 'Ibn Shihab said: "Had Uthman and Zayd both died at some point in time, knowledge of the obligatory shares of inheritance would have perished, for there was a time when only the two of them knew it."'
2113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Yusuf al-Majishun berkata: 'Ibn Shihab berkata: "Seandainya Utsman dan Zaid keduanya meninggal di suatu masa, ilmu faraidh pasti telah lenyap, karena ada masa ketika hanya mereka berdua yang mengetahuinya."'

2114.iwh_en: It was narrated that al-Qasim said: 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Learn the Quran and the obligatory shares of inheritance, for soon a man will be in need of knowledge he once had, and will find himself among people who do not know it."'
2114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa al-Qasim berkata: 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Pelajarilah Al-Qur'an dan faraidh, karena akan tiba saatnya seseorang sangat membutuhkan ilmu yang pernah ia miliki, namun ia berada di tengah kaum yang tidak mengetahuinya."'

2115.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abu al-Khalil said: 'Abu Musa (al-Ash'ari, may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Whoever learns the Quran but does not learn the obligatory shares of inheritance is like a cloak with no face — or: he has no face."'
2115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abu al-Khalil berkata: 'Abu Musa (al-Asy'ari, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Barangsiapa mempelajari Al-Qur'an namun tidak mempelajari faraidh, maka ia seperti jubah yang tidak berwajah — atau: tidak memiliki wajah."'

2116.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibrahim said: 'I said to Alqama: I do not know what to ask you about. He said: "Make your neighbors ignorant of it" — meaning the knowledge of inheritance — (that is, be the most knowledgeable so they come to you).'
2116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibrahim berkata: 'Aku berkata kepada Alqama: Aku tidak tahu apa yang harus aku tanyakan kepadamu. Ia berkata: "Jadikanlah tetangga-tetanggamu tidak mengetahuinya" — yakni ilmu faraidh.'

2117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Learn the obligatory shares of inheritance, divorce law, and the rites of Hajj, for they are part of your religion.'
2117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Pelajarilah faraidh, hukum talak, dan manasik haji, karena semuanya adalah bagian dari agama kalian.'

2118.iwh_en: It was narrated that al-Hasan (al-Basri) said: 'They used to encourage the teaching of the Quran, the obligatory shares of inheritance, and the rites of worship.'
2118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa al-Hasan (al-Bashri) berkata: 'Mereka biasa mendorong pengajaran Al-Qur'an, faraidh, dan manasik ibadah.'

2119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu 'Ubayda, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'Whoever reads the Quran, let him also learn the obligatory shares of inheritance. If a Bedouin meets him and says: O Muhajir, do you read the Quran? If he says yes, he will ask: Do you know the laws of inheritance? If he says yes, that is more and better for him. But if he says no, the Bedouin will say: Then what virtue do you have over me?'
2119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu 'Ubayda, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Barangsiapa membaca Al-Qur'an, hendaklah ia juga mempelajari faraidh. Jika seorang Arab Badui bertemu dengannya dan bertanya: Wahai Muhajir, apakah kamu membaca Al-Qur'an? Jika ia menjawab ya, si Badui bertanya: Apakah kamu menguasai faraidh? Jika ia menjawab ya, itu lebih baik baginya. Namun jika ia menjawab tidak, si Badui berkata: Lalu apa kelebihanmu dariku?'

2120.iwh_en: It was narrated that Muslim said: 'We asked Masruq: Did Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) excel in knowledge of the obligatory shares of inheritance? He said: "By the One besides Whom there is no god, I saw the greatest of the Companions of Muhammad ﷺ asking her about the obligatory shares of inheritance."'
2120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Muslim berkata: 'Kami bertanya kepada Masruq: Apakah Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) menguasai ilmu faraidh? Ia berkata: "Demi Zat yang tiada ilah selain-Nya, aku melihat para sahabat besar Nabi Muhammad ﷺ bertanya kepadanya tentang faraidh."'

2121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas and Abu Bakra (may Allah be pleased with both of them) — Shu'ba said: the former was the first to shoot an arrow in the cause of Allah, and the latter descended from the fortress of Ta'if to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — that both of them narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever falsely claims descent from other than his father, knowing that he is not his father, Paradise is forbidden for him.'
2121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas dan Abu Bakra (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) — Syu'ba berkata: yang pertama adalah orang pertama yang melepaskan anak panah di jalan Allah, dan yang kedua turun dari benteng Ta'if menuju Rasulullah ﷺ — bahwa keduanya meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengaku-aku nasab kepada selain ayahnya, padahal ia tahu bahwa orang itu bukan ayahnya, maka surga diharamkan baginya.'

2122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Bakr al-Siddiq (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'To claim lineage to someone unknown is disbelief in Allah, and to disavow one's lineage, however slight, is disbelief in Allah.'
2122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Bakr al-Shiddiq (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Mengklaim nasab kepada seseorang yang tidak dikenal adalah kekufuran terhadap Allah, dan mengingkari nasab sendiri, betapapun kecilnya, adalah kekufuran terhadap Allah.'

2123.iwh_en: It was narrated that Qays ibn Abi Hazim said: 'I came to the Prophet ﷺ to pledge allegiance to him, but I arrived after he had passed away. Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) was standing in his place, and he prolonged his praise and wept much. Then he said: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Whoever claims lineage to other than his father, or takes as patron someone other than his patrons who freed him, upon him is the curse of Allah, the angels, and all of mankind until the Day of Resurrection."'
2123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Qais ibn Abi Hazim berkata: 'Aku datang kepada Nabi ﷺ untuk berbaiat kepadanya, namun aku tiba setelah beliau wafat. Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berdiri di tempatnya, memperpanjang pujian dan banyak menangis. Kemudian ia berkata: Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa mengklaim nasab kepada selain ayahnya, atau menisbatkan diri kepada selain mawali yang memerdekakannya, maka ia mendapat laknat Allah, para malaikat, dan seluruh manusia hingga hari kiamat."'

2124.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "If any man claims descent from other than his father, or takes as patron someone other than his masters who freed him, upon him is the curse of Allah, the angels, and all of mankind until the Day of Resurrection. Neither his obligatory acts nor his supererogatory ones will be accepted from him."'
2124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa mengklaim nasab kepada selain ayahnya, atau menisbatkan diri kepada selain mawali yang memerdekakannya, maka ia mendapat laknat Allah, para malaikat, dan seluruh manusia hingga hari kiamat. Tidak akan diterima darinya amal wajib maupun sunahnya."'

2125.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'Whenever Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) took a path, we found it easy. And he ruled in the case of a husband and two parents: "The husband gets half, and the mother gets a third of what remains."'
2125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Setiap kali Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengambil suatu jalan, kami mendapatinya mudah. Dan ia memutuskan dalam perkara suami dan kedua orang tua: "Suami mendapat separuh, dan ibu mendapat sepertiga dari sisa harta."'

2126.iwh_en: It was narrated that Yazid al-Rishk said: 'I asked Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib about a man who died leaving his wife and both parents. He said: "Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) divided it among four shares."'
2126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Yazid al-Rishk berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib tentang seorang laki-laki yang meninggal dunia dan meninggalkan istri serta kedua orang tuanya. Ia berkata: "Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) membaginya menjadi empat bagian."'

2127.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Muhallab that Uthman ibn 'Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) said regarding a woman and both parents: 'The wife gets a quarter, and the mother gets a third of what remains.'
2127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Muhallab bahwa Utsman ibn 'Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata mengenai seorang perempuan dan kedua orang tua: 'Istri mendapat seperempat, dan ibu mendapat sepertiga dari sisa harta.'

2128.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Muhallab, from Uthman ibn 'Affan (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'The wife gets a quarter — one share out of four; the mother gets a third of what remains — one share; and the father gets two shares.'
2128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Muhallab, dari Utsman ibn 'Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Istri mendapat seperempat — satu bagian dari empat; ibu mendapat sepertiga dari sisa — satu bagian; dan ayah mendapat dua bagian.'

2129.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib, from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said regarding a woman who died leaving her husband and both parents: 'The husband gets half, and the mother gets a third of what remains.'
2129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib, dari Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata tentang seorang perempuan yang meninggal dunia dan meninggalkan suami serta kedua orang tuanya: 'Suami mendapat separuh, dan ibu mendapat sepertiga dari sisa harta.'

2130.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding a woman and both parents: 'Divide it from four: the wife gets a quarter, the mother gets a third of what remains, and what remains is for the father.'
2130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengenai seorang perempuan dan kedua orang tua: 'Bagikan dari empat: istri mendapat seperempat, ibu mendapat sepertiga dari sisa, dan sisanya untuk ayah.'

2131.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'Whenever Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) took a path we followed him in it and found it easy. And he ruled in the case of a wife and both parents, from four shares: he gave the wife a quarter, the mother a third of what remains, and the father two shares.'
2131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Setiap kali Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengambil suatu jalan, kami mengikutinya dan mendapatinya mudah. Dan ia memutuskan dalam perkara istri dan kedua orang tua, dari empat bagian: ia memberi istri seperempat, ibu sepertiga dari sisa, dan ayah dua bagian.'

2132.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Allah would not see me favouring a mother over a father in inheritance.'
2132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Allah tidak akan melihatku mengutamakan ibu atas ayah dalam hal warisan.'

2133.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ikrima that he said: 'Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) sent to Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him): Do you find in the Book of Allah that the mother receives a third of what remains? Zayd replied: You are a man who speaks according to your own opinion, and I am a man who speaks according to my own opinion.'
2133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ikrimah bahwa ia berkata: 'Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengutus seseorang kepada Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu): Apakah kamu menemukan dalam Kitab Allah bahwa ibu mendapat sepertiga dari sisa harta? Zaid menjawab: Engkau adalah orang yang berbicara berdasarkan pendapatmu sendiri, dan aku pun berbicara berdasarkan pendapatku sendiri.'

2134.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi and from 'Ata', from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that both of them said regarding a husband and both parents: 'The husband gets half, the mother gets a third of the total estate, and what remains is for the father.'
2134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi dan dari 'Atha', dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa keduanya berkata tentang suami dan kedua orang tua: 'Suami mendapat separuh, ibu mendapat sepertiga dari seluruh harta, dan sisanya untuk ayah.'

2135.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim, from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'The mother gets a third of the total estate — both in the case of a wife and both parents, and in the case of a husband and both parents.'
2135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim, dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Ibu mendapat sepertiga dari seluruh harta — baik dalam perkara istri dan kedua orang tua, maupun dalam perkara suami dan kedua orang tua.'

2136.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Fudayl ibn 'Amr, from Ibrahim, that he said: 'Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) differed from the rest of the people of the qibla in the case of a wife and both parents: he gave the mother a third of the entire estate.'
2136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Fudail ibn 'Amr, dari Ibrahim, bahwa ia berkata: 'Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berbeda pendapat dari seluruh ahli kiblat dalam perkara istri dan kedua orang tua: ia memberi ibu sepertiga dari seluruh harta.'

2137.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Aswad ibn Yazid that he said: 'Mu'adh ibn Jabal (may Allah be pleased with him) judged in Yemen in the case of a daughter and a sister: he gave the daughter half and the sister half.'
2137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Aswad ibn Yazid bahwa ia berkata: 'Mu'adh ibn Jabal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memutuskan perkara di Yaman tentang seorang anak perempuan dan seorang saudari: ia memberi anak perempuan separuh dan saudari separuh.'

2138.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Aswad ibn Yazid that Ibn al-Zubayr used not to give the paternal sister an inheritance share alongside a daughter — until al-Aswad narrated to him that Mu'adh ibn Jabal (may Allah be pleased with him) gave the daughter half and the sister half. Ibn al-Zubayr said: 'You are my messenger to Abdullah ibn 'Utba.'
2138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Aswad ibn Yazid bahwa Ibn al-Zubair tidak memberikan bagian waris kepada saudari seayah bersama anak perempuan — hingga al-Aswad meriwayatkan kepadanya bahwa Mu'adh ibn Jabal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberi anak perempuan separuh dan saudari separuh. Ibn al-Zubair berkata: 'Engkau adalah utusanku kepada Abdullah ibn 'Utbah.'

2139.iwh_en: It was narrated that Bishr ibn 'Umar said: 'I asked Ibn Abi al-Zinad about a man who died leaving a daughter and a sister. He said: "The daughter gets half, and the sister gets what remains." And he said: My father informed me, from Kharija ibn Zayd, that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) "used to make sisters residual heirs alongside daughters — giving them only what remained."'
2139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Bisyr ibn 'Umar berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Ibn Abi al-Zinad tentang seorang laki-laki yang meninggal dan meninggalkan seorang anak perempuan dan seorang saudari. Ia berkata: "Anak perempuan mendapat separuh, dan saudari mendapat sisanya." Ia juga berkata: Ayahku memberitahuku, dari Kharijah ibn Zaid, bahwa Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) "biasa menjadikan saudari-saudari sebagai ahli waris 'ashabah bersama anak-anak perempuan — hanya memberi mereka sisa harta."'

2140.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that in the case of a husband, a mother, full brothers and sisters (from father and mother), and uterine brothers (from mother only): Umar, Abdullah, and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them all) used to share them equally, and Umar said: 'The (common) father only made them closer to each other.'
2140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa dalam perkara suami, ibu, saudara-saudari kandung (dari ayah dan ibu), dan saudara-saudara seibu: Umar, Abdullah, dan Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhum) biasa membagi mereka secara merata, dan Umar berkata: 'Keberadaan ayah hanya menjadikan mereka lebih dekat satu sama lain.'

2141.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Harith, from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), that he used not to share (equally between full siblings and uterine siblings in the al-mushtarika case).
2141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Harits, dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia tidak membagikan secara merata (antara saudara kandung dan saudara seibu dalam perkara al-musytarakah).

2142.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Mijlaz that Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) used to share (between full siblings and uterine siblings in the al-mushtarika case), while Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) did not share.
2142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Mijlaz bahwa Utsman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagikan secara merata (antara saudara kandung dan saudara seibu dalam perkara al-musytarakah), sedangkan Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tidak membagikan secara merata.

2143.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Dhakwan that Zayd (ibn Thabit, may Allah be pleased with him) used to share (between full siblings and uterine siblings in the al-mushtarika case).
2143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Dzakwan bahwa Zaid (ibn Tsabit, radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa membagikan secara merata (antara saudara kandung dan saudara seibu dalam perkara al-musytarakah).

2144.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abd al-Malik ibn 'Umayr, from Shurayh, that he used to share (between full siblings and uterine siblings in the al-mushtarika case).
2144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abd al-Malik ibn 'Umair, dari Syuraih, bahwa ia biasa membagikan secara merata (antara saudara kandung dan saudara seibu dalam perkara al-musytarakah).

2145.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn Fayruz, from his father, that Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said regarding al-mushtarika (the sharing case): 'The (common) father only made them closer to each other.'
2145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn Fairuz, dari ayahnya, bahwa Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata tentang al-musytarakah: 'Keberadaan ayah hanya menjadikan mereka lebih dekat satu sama lain.'

2146.iwh_en: It was narrated that al-Harith al-A'war said: 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) was brought a case of two paternal cousins, one of whom was also a uterine brother. He said: All the estate goes to his uterine brother — and he ranked him in the position of a full brother (from both parents). When Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) came, I asked him about it and told him of Abdullah's ruling. Ali said: He gave him a sixth, and what remains is shared between them.'
2146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa al-Harits al-A'war berkata: 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) dihadapkan pada perkara dua anak paman, salah satunya juga merupakan saudara seibu. Ia berkata: Seluruh harta untuk saudara seibunya — dan ia mendudukkannya pada posisi saudara kandung. Ketika Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) datang, aku menanyakannya kepadanya dan memberitahunya tentang keputusan Abdullah. Ali berkata: Ia mendapat seperenam, dan sisa dibagi di antara mereka.'

2147.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Harith, from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), that he was brought a case of two paternal cousins, one of whom was also a uterine brother. It was said to Ali: Ibn Mas'ud used to give him all the estate. Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) said: He was indeed a jurist. But if it were I, I would give him a sixth, and what remains would be divided between them.
2147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Harits, dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia dihadapkan pada perkara dua anak paman, salah satunya juga merupakan saudara seibu. Dikatakan kepada Ali: Ibn Mas'ud biasa memberikan seluruh harta kepadanya. Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Ia memang seorang ahli fiqih. Namun kalau aku, aku akan memberinya seperenam, dan sisanya dibagi di antara mereka.

2148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Huzayl ibn Shurahbil that he said: 'A man came to Abu Musa al-Ash'ari and Salman ibn Rabi'a and asked them about a daughter, a granddaughter, and a full sister. They said: The daughter gets half, and the sister gets what remains. Go to Ibn Mas'ud, for he will agree with us. So the man went to Ibn Mas'ud and told him, and Ibn Mas'ud said: I would then have gone astray and not been rightly guided. I rule as the Prophet ﷺ ruled: the daughter gets half, the granddaughter gets a sixth to complete two thirds, and what remains is for the sister.'
2148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Huzail ibn Syurahbil bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang laki-laki datang kepada Abu Musa al-Asy'ari dan Salman ibn Rabi'ah dan bertanya kepada mereka tentang seorang anak perempuan, anak perempuan dari anak laki-laki, dan seorang saudari kandung. Mereka berkata: Anak perempuan mendapat separuh, dan saudari mendapat sisanya. Pergilah kepada Ibn Mas'ud, karena ia akan sependapat dengan kami. Maka laki-laki itu pergi kepada Ibn Mas'ud dan memberitahunya, lalu Ibn Mas'ud berkata: Aku pasti sudah sesat dan tidak mendapat petunjuk. Aku memutuskan sebagaimana Nabi ﷺ memutuskan: anak perempuan mendapat separuh, cucu perempuan mendapat seperenam untuk melengkapi dua pertiga, dan sisanya untuk saudari.'

2149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Masruq, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), that he used to say regarding full sisters and paternal brothers and sisters: 'The full sisters get two thirds, and what remains goes to the males, not to the females.' Masruq then came to Medina and heard the ruling of Zayd (ibn Thabit, may Allah be pleased with him) on it.
2149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Masruq, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia biasa berkata tentang saudari-saudari kandung dan saudara-saudari seayah: 'Saudari-saudari kandung mendapat dua pertiga, dan sisanya untuk kaum laki-laki, bukan perempuan.' Kemudian Masruq datang ke Madinah dan mendengar keputusan Zaid (ibn Tsabit, radhiyallahu 'anhu) dalam hal itu.

2150.iwh_en: It was narrated that Isma'il said: 'We mentioned in the presence of Hakim ibn Jabir that Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) said regarding full sisters and paternal brothers and sisters: that he used to give the full sisters two thirds and what remains to the males, not the females. Hakim said: Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said: That is contrary to the Quran.'
2150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ismail berkata: 'Kami menyebut di hadapan Hakim ibn Jabir bahwa Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata tentang saudari-saudari kandung dan saudara-saudari seayah: bahwa ia biasa memberi saudari-saudari kandung dua pertiga dan sisanya untuk kaum laki-laki, bukan perempuan. Hakim berkata: Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Itu bertentangan dengan Al-Qur'an.'

2151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Masruq, from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), that she used to share the inheritance equally between two daughters, a granddaughter, and a grandson: she gave the two daughters two thirds, and what remained was shared between them (the granddaughter and grandson).
2151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Masruq, dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa ia biasa membagi warisan secara merata antara dua anak perempuan, cucu perempuan, dan cucu laki-laki: ia memberi dua anak perempuan dua pertiga, dan sisanya dibagi antara mereka (cucu perempuan dan cucu laki-laki).

2152.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) did not share (equally between grandsons and granddaughters); he gave the males over the females. And he said: 'Sisters are in the position of daughters.'
2152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) tidak membagi secara merata (antara cucu laki-laki dan cucu perempuan); ia mengutamakan laki-laki atas perempuan. Dan ia berkata: 'Saudari-saudari berkedudukan seperti anak-anak perempuan.'

2153.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) used to say regarding a daughter, granddaughters, and a grandson: 'If the equal division among them is less than a sixth, give them a sixth; and if it is more than a sixth, give them the sixth.'
2153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa berkata tentang seorang anak perempuan, cucu-cucu perempuan, dan seorang cucu laki-laki: 'Jika pembagian merata di antara mereka kurang dari seperenam, berilah mereka seperenam; dan jika lebih dari seperenam, berilah mereka seperenam.'

2154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim, from Masruq, that he used to share (equally in certain cases). Alqama said to him: Is there anyone among them more reliable than Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud)? He said: No. But I saw Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) and the people of Medina sharing equally in the case of two daughters, a granddaughter, a grandson, and two sisters.
2154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim, dari Masruq, bahwa ia biasa membagi secara merata (dalam kasus-kasus tertentu). Alqama berkata kepadanya: Apakah ada seseorang di antara mereka yang lebih tsiqah dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud)? Ia berkata: Tidak. Namun aku melihat Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan penduduk Madinah membagi secara merata dalam perkara dua anak perempuan, seorang cucu perempuan, seorang cucu laki-laki, dan dua orang saudari.

2155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muhammad ibn Sirin, from Shurayh, regarding a woman who died leaving her husband, her mother, her full sister, her paternal sister, and her uterine brothers: 'He divided it from six, then raised it to ten. The husband gets half — three shares; the full sister gets half — three shares; the mother gets a sixth — one share; the uterine brothers share a third — two shares; and the paternal sister gets nothing.'
2155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muhammad ibn Sirin, dari Syuraih, tentang seorang perempuan yang meninggal dunia dan meninggalkan suami, ibu, saudari kandung, saudari seayah, dan saudara-saudara seibu: 'Ia membaginya dari enam, kemudian menaikkannya menjadi sepuluh. Suami mendapat separuh — tiga bagian; saudari kandung mendapat separuh — tiga bagian; ibu mendapat seperenam — satu bagian; saudara-saudara seibu berbagi sepertiga — dua bagian; dan saudari seayah tidak mendapat apa-apa.'

2156.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that Ali and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) used not to exclude heirs on account of unbelievers or slaves, nor did they give them any inheritance.
2156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa Ali dan Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) tidak menggunakan orang-orang kafir dan budak sebagai penghalang warisan, dan juga tidak memberikan warisan kepada mereka.

2157.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) used to exclude heirs on account of unbelievers and slaves, but did not give them any inheritance.
2157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa menggunakan orang-orang kafir dan budak sebagai penghalang warisan, namun tidak memberikan warisan kepada mereka.

2158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that Ali and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) said: 'Slaves and People of the Book neither block (inheritance) nor inherit.'
2158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa Ali dan Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) berkata: 'Para budak dan Ahlu Kitab tidak menghalangi (warisan) dan tidak mewarisi.'

2159.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: '(Slaves and unbelievers) block (other heirs from inheriting), but do not inherit themselves.'
2159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: '(Para budak dan orang-orang kafir) menghalangi (ahli waris lain dari mewarisi), namun mereka sendiri tidak mewarisi.'

2160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id (ibn al-Musayyib) that Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) had written down the inheritance share of the grandfather. But when he was stabbed, he called for the document and erased it, then said: 'You will see your own opinion regarding it.'
2160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id (ibn al-Musayyib) bahwa Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) pernah menuliskan bagian waris kakek. Namun ketika ia ditikam, ia meminta dokumen itu dan menghapusnya, lalu berkata: 'Kalian akan menentukan pendapat kalian sendiri mengenainya.'
